CustomField.description: Optional lookup to the per-config parent record. Automatically populated by CursorBatchCoordinator.createJobRecord() when a matching active CursorBatch_Config__mdt record exists for Job_Name__c; left null for custom coordinators that have no metadata configuration.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Parent record grouping all runs of this metadata-defined job. Automatically set by the framework when a matching CursorBatch_Config__mdt exists.
CustomField.label: Job Parent
